title: Principal Plant Manager at Dalmia Bharat Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at Dalmia Bharat Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Dalmia Bharat Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Srinagar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Dalmia Bharat Holdings Services:
Dalmia Bharat Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dalmia Bharat Holdings Services!
